title: Automation Loop Alerts -  To prevent depletion of usable actions
excerpt:
It would be useful to have some type of alert or notification to prevent the loss of action features when you have a automation or recipe loop?   Or is there another way to prevent this issue?

posts.cookedHtml:
It would be useful to have some type of alert or notification to prevent the loss of action features when you have a automation or recipe loop? Or is there another way to prevent this issue?

depleted total almost a full months of actions in a day in a half before I realized my error.
